1.premise: "Prematurely" can mean early birth or ejaculating too quickly.
Failing to pick up dog poop could be making excuses for animals.
A racist impression implies Mexicans, but reveals Japanese soldiers hearing Navajo Code Talkers.
Drug addiction is like fatherhood because both are exhausting and thankless.

lines.text: Guys, believe it or not, I was actually born prematurely.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: My dad came quick.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: It's crazy.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: The other day, I was out in public with my dog,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and it took a shit, and I didn't have a bag.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I did that move, you know, and I was like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Man, is this what white guilt feels like?"
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: "Having to make excuses for animals?"
lines.label: tag

lines.text: "All right, you're gonna love this next one."
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I've been really working on this impression.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Here, I'm gonna hit you with it.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Oh, yeah, boss.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: They look like a skinny Mexican.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And they talk like a "Ho yo yo yo ho yo yo yo."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Yo, that's the Japanese scene
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: the Navajo Code Talkers for the first time.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Little history for your ass.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Um, before I was a dad, I was a drug addict,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and I thought I was gonna be a terrible father.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So I found out that being a drug addict and being a dad,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Zach's ain't fucking life.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I'll end it at that, 'cause it's pretty deep.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: But, yeah, that's been my time. Thank you so much.
lines.label: fluff
